text:
is Hange Zoë's personal assistant in the Scout Regiment.

Appearance

Moblit's bright hair is parted neatly in the middle. He has dark, swirly green eyes and wears the typical Scout Regiment uniform.

Personality

Moblit is very meticulous in his work and usually reprimands Hange for making rash decisions. As a result, he has visibly expressed exhaustion from working under Hange. Her obsession with Titans worries him and though he shows some disapproval towards her behavior, Moblit is always by the side of his superior, albeit reluctantly.
